name: PM-KISAN
description: Central sector scheme providing income support to all landholding farmer families across the country.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year paid in three equal installments of ₹2,000 directly into the bank accounts of the farmers.

name: PMFBY
description: Government sponsored crop insurance scheme integrating multiple stakeholders to protect against crop yield loss.
benefits: Comprehensive risk insurance for crop failure due to drought, flood, pests, or disease with low premium rates (1.5% - 2% for farmers).

name: KCC
description: Provides farmers with timely and hassle-free access to short-term credit for cultivation, crop production, and maintenance.
benefits: Flexible revolving credit up to ₹3 Lakh at attractive interest rates (effectively 4% after interest subvention) with flexible repayment terms.

name: Soil Health Card
description: Assists state governments to issue Soil Health Cards to all farmers in the country to promote balanced crop nutrition.
benefits: Free soil test card containing nutrient status of soil across 12 parameters and tailored dosage recommendations for fertilizer applications.

name: MahaDBT Pokra
description: Maharashtra State initiative focusing on climate-resilient agriculture in drought-prone regions and salinity-affected basins.
benefits: Up to 75% - 85% subsidies for micro-irrigation systems, farm ponds, plastic lining, agroforestry, and custom hiring centers.
